name: OGC API - Dimensions Building Blocks
abstract: OGC API - Dimensions is a profile of OGC API - Records that defines how datacube dimension metadata and members are represented as Record collections and Records, respectively. It is packaged as five OGC Building Blocks that can be adopted independently.

bblocks.name: Dimension Collection
bblocks.abstract: A Records catalogue whose items are dimension members. Extends collection metadata with a generator object (from STAC Datacube Extension) that drives algorithmic member production.

bblocks.name: Dimension Member
bblocks.abstract: A Record representing a single dimension member with time.interval, multilingual labels, and dimension-specific properties (code, index, type).

bblocks.name: Dimension Pagination
bblocks.abstract: OGC Common Part 2 pagination profile for dimension members. numberMatched reflects total members in the extent; offset/limit traverse the generated sequence.

bblocks.name: Dimension Inverse
bblocks.abstract: Defines the /inverse endpoint: given a raw value, return the dimension member it belongs to. Enables ingestion-time coordinate validation.

bblocks.name: Dimension Hierarchical
bblocks.abstract: Defines /children and /ancestors endpoints and the ?parent= filter for hierarchical dimension navigation. Supports both leveled (fixed-depth) and recursive (arbitrary-depth) tree structures.
